cards.title: When Your Child Says 'I Hate You'
cards.body: Most parents hear "I hate you" when frustration peaks. Learn how to understand what this outburst really means and respond thoughtfully.

cards.title: Young Athletes Struggle Beyond Sports
cards.body: Many young athletes devote their lives to sports 24/7, risking their identity development. Exploring the emotional turmoil when their sports career ends.

cards.title: Sibling Abuse Support Resources Expanding
cards.body: Survivors of sibling abuse now have access to dedicated organizations and communities. These resources offer life-changing connections for survivors and families.

cards.title: Summer Structure Prevents Child Boredom
cards.body: Summertime can quickly turn to boredom and anxiety without proper planning. Adding structure helps kids enjoy carefree fun while staying engaged.

cards.title: Maternity Unit Failures Investigated
cards.body: BBC Panorama revealed serious failings at Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust's maternity unit. Documents and testimonies from former midwives highlight patient safety concerns.

cards.title: Sudden Cardiac Death Risk in Young Women
cards.body: Silent heart conditions can affect young women without warning, not just sporty young men. New checks are revealing previously undiagnosed deadly cardiac risks.

cards.title: Keeping Late Wife's Books Helps Grieving Father
cards.body: A father preserves his deceased wife's favorite novels as a way to honor her memory with their son. Reading together helps him process grief and guilt.

cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Wellbeing
cards.body: Estrangement from family exists on a continuum rather than as a binary choice. Research shows mixed wellbeing effects, with support playing a crucial role.

cards.title: Dad's Deathbed Advice Shapes Life
cards.body: A parent's final words can profoundly influence how children live for decades. One writer reflects on how her father's advice continues guiding her.

cards.title: One-Night Stand Becomes Family
cards.body: What started as a hook-up between Sofia and León became marriage and two babies. The couple shares how they're finding new intimacy as parents.
